usage: create_property_alias [-help] -map <alias_propery_name_pairs> -obj_type {pin port cell net clock lib_cell lib_pin design lib timing_path timing_point timing_arc path_group lib_timing_arc si_victim si_attacker lib_pg_pin pg_pin pg_net}

options.name: -map
options.description: Specifies pair list of alias and property to be associate with that alias like {alias1 prop1} or {{ialias1 prop1}{alias2 prop2}...}

options.name: -obj_type
options.description: {pin port cell net clock lib_cell lib_pin design lib timing_path timing_point timing_arc path_group lib_timing_arc si_victim si_attacker lib_pg_pin pg_pin pg_net} Specifies Object Type for which a property alias needs to be created
